description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests targeting master. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9). In each job, check out the code, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with poetry, configure a Git user, run tests with pytest, verify the package format with twine, and upload coverage results to Coveralls.
